get.description: Internal: every API key across all owners (newest first) with name, scopes, masked start, expiry, last use and owner email. The secret is never returned.

post.description: Internal: create a scoped machine key owned by the calling admin. Returns the plaintext key exactly once (stored hashed thereafter).
Internal: delete any API key by id (admin can revoke keys owned by anyone, including CLI-minted bot keys).

get.description: Internal: each background task with its schedule, next/previous run, execution count, last result/error and current status.

delete.description: Internal: memberships, opt-outs and SSO auto-join links cascade.

get.description: Internal: league with members and join code.

put.description: Internal: rename or change visibility.

post.summary: Add a user to a league
post.description: Internal: upserts the membership, clears a past leave, and assigning OWNER demotes the current owner.

delete.summary: Remove a user from a league
delete.description: Internal: removal is remembered so SSO auto-join cannot re-add the user.

404.description: Unknown league or not a member.

put.description: Internal: any role; assigning OWNER demotes the current owner.

404.description: Unknown league or target not a member.

get.description: Internal: every league with owner, member count, join code and SSO auto-join links.

post.description: Internal: optionally ownerless (for SSO auto-join leagues; site admins moderate them).
Internal: irreversibly deletes every league without a single member (join codes, opt-outs and SSO auto-join links go with them).

post.summary: Apply SSO auto-join to existing users
post.description: Internal: back-fills provider league auto-join for every existing user whose email domain a linked provider captures, without waiting for them to log in again. Idempotent; honors opt-outs.

delete.description: Internal: delete one curated link by id.

post.description: Internal: attach a LIVE/REPLAY/HIGHLIGHTS link to a match. Accepts an admin session or a media:write API key (the curation bot).

get.description: Every competition with its current odds provider and event ref, plus the known providers and whether each can fetch odds over HTTP.

put.description: Point a competition at an odds provider and its event ref. The next odds poll uses the new provider; nothing is rescored.

delete.description: Internal: remove an entry from the public roadmap.

put.description: Internal: edit title/description, move between statuses, or reorder.

get.description: Internal: every roadmap item including hidden/rejected suggestions, with author, moderation state and upvote count for triage.

post.description: Internal: add an entry to the public roadmap.

put.description: Internal: set the full ordering of one status column. Every id is placed at its array index in that status; a card dragged in from another column takes the new status, and a pending suggestion promoted onto the roadmap is auto-approved.

post.description: Internal: trigger a registered background task on demand (admin cron view).

200.description: Task result (or { started: true } for fire-and-forget tasks).

delete.description: Remove a competition's scoring override so it falls back to the default, then recompute its ladder.

200.description: Override removed; returns how many matches were rescored.

get.description: The default scoring config and every per-competition override, plus the competitions available to override.

put.description: Upsert the default scoring config (omit competition) or a per-competition override, then recompute every affected competition's ladder.

200.description: Saved; returns the new config version and how many matches were rescored.

get.description: Internal: admin-toggleable flags and whether the mail transport is configured.

post.description: Internal: require new sign-ups to confirm their email. Enabling needs SMTP configured and grandfathers existing accounts as verified.

put.description: Internal: edit a registered provider. Blank secrets keep their stored value; the provider type and providerId are immutable.

post.description: Internal: mark the provider domain verified without DNS proof (admin-trusted, single-tenant).

put.description: Internal: replace-set. Users signing in through this provider are added to these leagues unless they previously left.

delete.description: Internal: delete the SCIM connection so the IdP bearer stops working.

post.description: Internal: mint (or rotate) the SCIM bearer for a provider. Returned once; stored hashed.

200.description: The SCIM token (shown once) + base URL.

put.description: Internal: move a provider between draft/enabled/disabled. Enabling requires a passing connection test and a verified domain.

post.description: Internal: run automated reachability/config checks and store the result on the provider.

get.description: Internal: the claims captured by a dry-run OIDC test sign-in.

200.description: Captured claims, or null if not ready.

post.description: Internal: build the authorization URL for a dry-run claim preview (OIDC only).

400.description: Provider is not OIDC or is misconfigured.

get.description: Internal: the TXT host/value to publish for DNS domain verification.

post.summary: Verify an SSO provider domain via DNS
post.description: Internal: resolve the TXT record and flip domainVerified when it matches.

get.description: Internal: registered SSO providers (secrets stay encrypted at rest).

post.description: Internal: add an OIDC/SAML/Google provider at runtime. Secrets are envelope-encrypted before storage.

get.description: Whether the current session belongs to an admin. Internal: drives the admin UI.

post.description: Internal: removes the TOTP enrollment and backup codes of a locked-out user.
Internal: removes all SSO account links. Without a password the user can recover one through the reset flow.
Internal: mark a user's email verified by hand (mail never arrived, or a rescue).

post.summary: Hide or show a user on the leaderboard
post.description: Internal: hidden users keep playing (their predictions still count in crowd totals) but never appear in rankings.

get.description: Internal: map of userId to linked SSO provider ids.
The Golden Boot pick and whether it is still editable (locks at the first kickoff).

put.description: Set the Golden Boot pick. Locked from the first kickoff of the competition.

get.description: Where a bot persona would rank against the real board. Display-only: real ranks are untouched.

200.description: The bot's would-be leaderboard row, or null before any match is scored.

401.description: League view requires being signed in.

404.description: Unknown league, or private league the caller is not in.

get.description: Per-match picks of a bot persona with the points it would have scored. Personas: consensus (the crowd's pick), evil-twin (that pick inverted), equalizer (always a draw). Upcoming matches are admin-only.

200.description: Consensus picks per kicked-off match (plus upcoming ones for admins), summary totals and rank.

401.description: League view requires being signed in.

get.description: The tournament-winner pick and whether it is still editable (locks at the first kickoff).

put.description: Set the tournament-winner pick. Locked from the first kickoff of the competition.

get.description: The caller's chat public key and whether a recovery escrow is saved (null if not enrolled).

put.description: Publishes the public key once. If one already exists it is returned unchanged (created: false).

post.description: Replaces the chat keypair with a new public key, appends it to the transparency log, drops the recovery escrow, and deletes every league/DM key sealed to the old key. Requires an existing identity.
Marks one room (matchId, or '__global__' for the league room) read up to now for the signed-in user, and clears that room's unread @mention notifications. Members only.

get.description: Ciphertext of the caller's private key, decryptable only client-side with their recovery code. Null if not set.

put.description: Stores the ciphertext escrow of the private key (requires an existing identity).

get.description: Authenticated. Returns open-graph metadata (title, description, image, site name) for an http(s) URL, for chat link previews. Private/loopback hosts are refused.

Every league-global room or match thread with unread messages and/or unread @mentions for the signed-in user, across all their leagues, newest activity first. Drives the cross-league chat inbox; survives reload (recomputed from persisted read markers).

The current head of the tamper-evident prediction ledger: the running seq and hash of the last committed pick change. Public and unauthenticated so anyone can snapshot it and later verify the history still reproduces it.

200.description: The chain head. seq 0 / all-zero hash means an empty ledger.

get.description: An ordered page of the tamper-evident prediction ledger. Every entry exposes its commitment, prevHash and entryHash (so the hash chain verifies); the opening (homeGoals, awayGoals, salt) is included only for entries whose match has kicked off. Predictors appear as an opaque subject hash, never their user id. Use nextSeq as ?afterSeq to fetch the next page.

200.description: A page of ledger entries plus the current chain head and the next cursor (null at the tail).

get.description: The knockout tree (rounds, feeders ordered under their parents) plus the champion once decided. Null while no knockout structure exists.

200.description: Bracket rounds and winner, or null.

get.description: Team codes certainly out of the tournament: knockout losers, group non-qualifiers, and teams mathematically eliminated mid-group (per the competition’s tiebreaker rules). Empty for a competition with no decided eliminations yet.
All active competitions, newest season first.
Top scorers and top assists for the competition, each ranked on its own metric, from official sources (FIFA player stats or UEFA rankings) with a local goal-event fallback.

200.description: { scorers, assists }, each an array of {playerName, teamName, teamCode, goals, assists}.

get.description: Every group-stage table for the competition (provisional: in-progress matches count live). Empty for knockout-only tournaments.
Every team that appears in the competition fixtures, with codes for flags and map placement.
Participant only. Returns the encrypted webp ciphertext for a message, decrypted on the client.

post.description: Author only. Replaces the ciphertext, drops/appends images, and pushes the edit + attachment set live to both participants.

get.description: The other participant and the caller sealed keys (all epochs) for a thread they are in.

post.summary: Re-seal the thread key to the other participant
post.description: Seals the current thread key to the other participant (after they reset their identity). Participant-only; idempotent.

get.description: Participant only. Image descriptors (messageId, idx, epoch) for the thread, newest first. The ciphertext is fetched per image and decrypted on the client.
Participant only. A page of encrypted messages for a thread, newest first, keyset-paginated. Each is a ChatMessageDTO (attachments, reactions, thread count); DM has no league/match and no moderation.

post.description: Participant only. Stores ciphertext + optional encrypted images, pushes it live to both participants and notifies the recipient.

put.description: Participant only. Sets the caller emoji reaction on a message (null clears it) and pushes the new totals live to both participants.

post.description: Sets the caller last-read marker to now for the thread. Participant only.

get.description: Public key + name for sealing a new DM thread key to a recipient.
Co-members (always) plus globally discoverable users matching q. Only users with a chat identity are returned.
Every DM conversation for the signed-in user, newest activity first, with unread counts and the caller sealed key.

post.description: Idempotent by participant pair. First creation seals the thread key to both participants.

400.description: Recipient has no chat identity / self / bad wraps.

post.description: Bumps the caller's feed-token version, revoking every previously-issued calendar URL, and returns a fresh subscription URL (https + webcal). Use if a feed link leaked.

200.description: The new https and webcal subscription URLs.

get.description: Mints the signed subscription URL (https + webcal) for the authenticated user's iCalendar feed of fixtures and pick deadlines. Deterministic per user + locale.

200.description: The https and webcal subscription URLs.

get.description: Compares two players over the matches they have both had scored in one competition: points, per-match wins, pick agreement, the lead over time and the biggest divergences. Use 'me' for either id to mean the signed-in user. A private profile 404s for anyone who cannot view it.

404.description: Unknown competition or user, or a private profile the caller cannot view.

get.description: The current head of the append-only key-transparency log (hash + size). Public anchor: pin it, then verify a later full-log fetch still contains this head.
The full append-only key-transparency log (ordered chat public-key bindings + head). Public: used to detect a server that substitutes a member key to MITM E2EE chat.
Per-competition or global leaderboard with movement arrows derived from rank snapshots.

200.description: Ranked players with points, exact counts and movement.

400.description: League belongs to another competition than the one requested.

401.description: League view requires being signed in.

404.description: Unknown league, or private league the caller is not in.

get.description: Members only. Whether chat is enabled, the key epoch, the caller sealed key, members missing a key, and member public keys.
Members only. Returns the encrypted webp ciphertext for a message, decrypted on the client.

post.description: OWNER/MODERATOR only. Flips chat off; keeps history and keys.
The author replaces their own message text (re-encrypted client-side) while it is visible. Pushed live.
OWNER/MODERATOR only. Bumps the key epoch and stores the sealed group key per member.

post.summary: Wrap the group key for members
post.description: A member holding the key seals it to newcomers at the current epoch (idempotent).

get.description: Members only. Image descriptors (messageId, idx, epoch) for the league room (or a match thread with ?matchId=), newest first. The ciphertext is fetched per image and decrypted on the client.
Members only. A page of encrypted messages for the league room (or a match thread with ?matchId=), newest first.

200.description: { messages: ChatMessageDTO[], readMarker: string | null }. readMarker is the caller's last-read time for the room (ISO), null on thread/paged fetches or an unopened room.

post.description: Members only, chat enabled. Stores ciphertext (league room, or a match thread with matchId) and pushes it live.
OWNER/MODERATOR only. Removes (tombstones) or restores a message and pushes the change live.

put.description: Members only. Sets the caller emoji reaction on a message (null clears it) and pushes the new totals live.

post.description: Members only. Flags a message; enough distinct reports auto-hide it pending moderation.

get.description: OWNER/MODERATOR only. Reported messages with their report counts and ciphertext for review.

post.description: A member missing the current key asks connected keyholders to re-seal it. Members only.
OWNER/MODERATOR only. Bumps the key epoch and stores a fresh sealed group key per current member, revoking anyone no longer a member.
Owner/moderator only. Send imageDataUrl as a base64 data: URL (jpeg/png/webp/gif, max 512KB); returns the stored image URL to embed in the markdown description.

delete.description: Owner or site admin. Memberships, opt-outs and SSO auto-join links are removed with it.

get.description: League info and member list. Members always; public leagues for anyone signed in; admins for moderation. Join code only for owners/moderators/admins.

404.description: Unknown league, or private league the caller is not in.

put.summary: Update a league (name, visibility, description, featured team, mode)
put.description: Name/description/featured team: owner or moderator. Visibility and mode: owner only. Mode can only change before the competition kicks off.

409.description: Competition already running; mode is locked.

422.description: Invalid body, or a featured team not in the competition.

delete.description: Owner/moderator only. The link stops working immediately.

403.description: Not an owner or moderator of this league.

get.description: Owner/moderator only. Spent (expired/exhausted) invites are pruned on read.

200.description: Active invites with token, expiry, use counts.

403.description: Not an owner or moderator of this league.

post.description: Owner/moderator only. Optional expiry (hours) and max number of uses.

403.description: Not an owner or moderator of this league.

post.description: One-click join, no code needed. Private leagues answer 404 so ids never leak existence.

put.summary: Set the joker on a league override

409.description: Match (or the round's joker) already kicked off.

post.description: Leaving is remembered: SSO auto-join will not re-add this user. An owner with members must transfer ownership or delete instead; the last member leaving keeps the (empty) league alive - its next joiner becomes owner.

delete.description: Owners kick moderators and members; moderators kick members. Kicks are remembered so SSO auto-join cannot undo them.

404.description: Unknown league or target not a member.

put.description: Owner only, between MEMBER and MODERATOR. Ownership moves through the transfer endpoint instead.

404.description: Unknown league or target not a member.

get.description: Points board (easy/hard) or survival board (hardcore), re-scored from members' effective picks. 400 for a NORMAL league - use the standard leaderboard instead.

get.summary: My override picks in a league

200.description: The caller's override picks for the league.

post.summary: Follow main picks or keep league-specific ones
post.description: synced=true makes the league mirror your base picks and drops your future overrides; synced=false lets you keep per-league overrides.

put.description: Moded leagues only. Keeping a league-specific pick switches that membership off sync so the league stops mirroring your base pick.

post.description: Owner or moderator. Invalidates the previous code - the way to revoke a leaked invitation.

get.description: Each of the five criteria: its configured prize (if any), the member currently leading it (live, settles at competition end), and whether you hold it.

404.description: Unknown league, or a private league the caller is not in.

put.description: Owner/moderator only. Replace-set: send the full desired list of prizes (label + optional image + note + link), one per criterion; a blank label removes that prize. Send imageDataUrl as a data: URL to upload, null to clear, omit to keep.

get.description: The live ranking of one award criterion among a league members: rank, member (concealed names blank), and the criterion value (points, or EXACT count for Madame IRMA). Settles at competition end.

404.description: Unknown league, or a private league the caller is not in.

post.description: Owner only. The previous owner becomes a moderator.

404.description: Unknown league or target not a member.

get.description: Leagues the signed-in user belongs to, with role and member count. Join code included for owners/moderators only.

post.description: Creates a competition-scoped league; the creator becomes its owner. Join codes are regenerable and guesses are rate limited, but treat them as invitations, not secrets.

200.description: The created league with its join code.

get.description: Public: league name, member count and invite status for the join landing page.

post.description: Joins the league behind the token. Consumes one use; expired/exhausted invites 409.

200.description: Joined; the league (same shape as join-by-code).

409.description: Already a member, invite expired, or invite exhausted.

429.description: More than 10 attempts within a minute.

post.summary: Join a league with a code
post.description: Code matching is case-insensitive and ignores spaces and dashes. Re-joining clears a previous leave, so SSO auto-join applies again.

429.description: More than 10 attempts within a minute.

get.description: Public leagues of a competition; anyone signed in can view their rankings or join with one click.
One match with standings context and the caller's prediction. isLocked reflects the server clock, not yours.

Pre/post-match intelligence: recent form, next matches, head-to-head (within our competitions plus an all-time tally from FIFA's full international calendar, friendlies included), group standings, goals and possession.

Picks ranked by the points they earn on this one match. With ?league, that league's members (members/admins only). Without it, every visible user who picked (private/hidden excluded) - the public ranking. Live matches score at the current scoreline (provisional); finished matches use the scored points. Picks are hidden until kickoff (scope 'upcoming', no rows). League members with no locked pick are summarised in notPredicted.

200.description: Ranked picks with points, plus scope and notPredicted.

404.description: Unknown league, or a league the caller is not a member of.

get.description: Starting XI and bench per team, with the formation (when the feed ships one) and head coach. Empty (available:false) until the official line-ups drop, about an hour before kickoff. Cached one minute while pending/live, for the process lifetime once finished.

200.description: Line-ups payload, or null when the provider exposes none.

get.description: Upstream detail: goals with assists, bookings (incl. touchline cards), substitutions, attendance, venue and per-team match stats. Cached 5 minutes while live, for the process lifetime once finished.

200.description: Detail payload or null when the provider has nothing.

get.description: Curated stream/replay/highlight links for a match. `embeddable` is resolved (admin override or host-whitelist default); the client filters by kind against match status.

get.summary: My earlier-pick counterfactual for a match
get.description: Replays the signed-in user's OWN earlier (swapped-off) score picks for this match through the scoring engine and surfaces the best one when it would have out-scored the pick they kept. Owner-only (session required) and never exposes another user's picks. Returns scope 'none' before kickoff, when no earlier pick beats the kept one, or when the kept pick is itself exact. Live matches score provisionally against the current scoreline (scope 'live'); finished matches use the final result (scope 'final'). The cheeky flag marks a winning 0-0 earlier pick.

200.description: The counterfactual, or { scope: 'none' } when there is nothing to surface.

get.description: Top scorers and top assists for the fixture's two teams (every contributor, not the tournament-wide top-N), from stored goal events.

200.description: { scorers, assists }, each an array of {playerName, teamName, teamCode, goals, assists}.

get.description: Curated minute-by-minute events (goals, cards, subs, shots, penalties, VAR, period markers) from the upstream feed, newest first. Cached one minute while live, for the process lifetime once finished.

200.description: Curated, newest-first event list (empty when the provider has nothing).

get.description: All fixtures of a competition grouped by round, with scores, status and (when signed in) your predictions.

The signed-in user's prediction bias report for a competition: tier breakdown, goals over/under-prediction, home-win and draw lean, teams they over- and under-rate, accuracy by round, best call and biggest miss. Unlike Wrapped it is not gated on the final; { hasData: false } until the user has a scored pick.

200.description: The analytics report, or { hasData: false } with no scored picks.

post.description: Re-verify password (and TOTP when 2FA is on) to open a 5-minute re-auth window, required for sensitive actions like registering a passkey.

200.description: {valid: boolean}; sets the re-auth cookie when valid.

post.description: Check a 6-digit authenticator code against the enrolled secret (used before disabling 2FA).
Idempotent; the prompt never shows again on any device.

post.summary: Finish or skip the one-time onboarding tour
post.description: Idempotent; the spotlight tour never auto-starts again on any device.
Clears the 2FA trust-device cookie so the next sign-in asks for the second factor again.

get.description: Every league prize you are currently leading, across all your leagues.
True when the account signs in through a registered SSO provider and has no local password.
Points, rank, exact-score count and joker usage for the signed-in user. With ?league=, rank and player count are scoped to that league.
Whether this browser currently holds a 2FA trust-device cookie.

The signed-in user's post-final recap: totals, rank and percentile, tier breakdown, best pick and biggest miss, joker and crowd stats, rank journey, chat counts, trophies and badges. Before the final is decided the response is { ready: false }.

200.description: The wrapped recap, or { ready: false } pre-final.

post.description: Permanently delete the given notification ids, or all of the user's notifications with `all: true`. Scoped to the owner.

get.description: The signed-in user's notifications, newest first, with the current unread count. Page back in time with `before`.

post.description: Mark the given notification ids read, or all of the user's unread notifications with `all: true`. Scoped to the owner; already-read rows are skipped.

200.description: Number of notifications that transitioned to read.

get.description: The combined total of every player's prediction per match (1-1 + 2-1 + 4-0 shows as 7-2), with the number of predictions. Shown under prediction inputs when the account preference is enabled. With ?league=, totals cover only that league's members (display only - the scoring crowd bonus is always computed from everyone).

200.description: Map of matchId to {home, away, count}.

400.description: League belongs to another competition than the one requested.

404.description: Unknown league, or private league the caller is not in.

get.description: All of the signed-in user's predictions for a competition, with per-match points once scored.

put.description: Create or update the score prediction for one match. Rejected once the match has kicked off (server-side lock) or while the teams are unconfirmed.

422.description: Invalid body, invalid scores, or unconfirmed teams.

put.description: Set or clear the x2 joker on a match. One per round; movable while neither match has kicked off. Rejected on single-match rounds (final, third place) and unconfirmed-team fixtures.

422.description: Invalid body, single-match round, or unconfirmed teams.

post.description: Store this browser's web-push subscription for the signed-in user (upserted on the endpoint).

409.description: Endpoint already registered to another account.

post.description: Delete this browser's stored web-push subscription for the signed-in user.

get.description: Per-emoji reaction counts for one match, plus the caller's own reaction (null when signed out or not reacted). Global counts are public; with ?league= the counts cover that league's members only (members or admins).

200.description: { totals: per-emoji counts, mine: the caller's reaction or null }.

401.description: League scope requested while signed out.

404.description: Unknown league, or a private league the caller is not in.

get.description: Per-emoji reaction counts for every match in a competition that has any reaction, keyed by match id (the fixtures list bulk-fetches this once). Global counts are public; with ?league= the counts cover that league's members only (members or admins). `mine` maps the caller's own reaction per match (empty when signed out).

200.description: { totals: map of matchId to per-emoji counts, mine: map of matchId to the caller's reaction }.

401.description: League scope requested while signed out.

404.description: Unknown league, or a private league the caller is not in.

put.description: Set, change, or clear (emoji: null) the caller's reaction on one match. Reactions open at kickoff and stay open after full-time; pre-kickoff reactions are rejected.

400.description: Invalid body, unknown reaction, or match not yet kicked off.

post.summary: Toggle an upvote on a roadmap item
post.description: Signed-in users upvote a roadmap item or suggestion; calling again removes the vote. Returns whether the caller now has a vote and the fresh total.

200.description: The toggled vote state and fresh count.

409.description: Voting is closed: the item is in progress or shipped.

get.description: Public roadmap: planned, in-progress and shipped features plus community suggestions, each with its upvote count. Pending suggestions are shown flagged underReview; hidden (rejected) items are omitted.

200.description: All visible roadmap items ordered by status then position.

post.description: Signed-in users propose a feature. It appears in the community suggestions column immediately and can be upvoted; admins triage it onto the roadmap or hide it. Rate limited per user.

get.description: Resolves a signed share token to the card data (leak-safe: a sealed pick exposes no score) plus the match it links back to. Powers the public /s/[token] landing page. 404 on an unknown or invalid token.

200.description: The card summary and link target.

post.description: Creates a signed, stateless token for your own personal-analytics (bias detector) card and returns the landing-page and OG image URLs. The token names only you; 404 until you have a scored pick.

200.description: The token, landing URL and OG image URL.

404.description: Unknown competition, or no scored pick to report yet.

get.description: Resolves a signed analytics token to the headline bias numbers (accuracy, exact rate, goal lean, home bias). Powers the public /a/[token] landing page. 404 on an unknown/invalid token or a user with no scored pick.

post.description: Creates a signed, stateless share token for your own pick on a match and returns the public share-page URL and OG image URL. Mode is forced by match timing: a kicked-off pick shares its result, a pre-kickoff pick is sealed unless reveal is requested.

200.description: The signed token and absolute share + image URLs.

404.description: You have no pick on that match to share.

post.description: Creates a signed, stateless token for your own profile card (rank, points, exacts, haul) and returns the landing-page and OG image URLs. The token names only you.

200.description: The token, landing URL and OG image URL.

get.description: Resolves a signed profile token to the card numbers (rank, points, exacts, haul). Powers the public /p/[token] landing page. 404 on an unknown or invalid token.

post.description: Creates a signed, stateless token for your own Tournament Wrapped summary card and returns the OG image URL. Only available once the final is decided.

200.description: The token and OG image URL.

404.description: Unknown competition, or the final is not decided yet.

put.description: Replace your showcase (the pinned, publicly-shown subset of your achievements) for a competition. Array order is display order; every achievement must be one you've earned.

400.description: Too many achievements, a duplicate, or one the user has not earned.

get.summary: Resolve the SSO provider for an email domain
get.description: Returns the providerId capturing the email domain, or null when password login applies.
Aggregate, name-free counts (registered players, predictions made) for the public landing page. No personal data.

Squad with positions and per-player goal involvement, coach, season stats, matches, group standings and the competitions the team appears in. lite=1 skips the expensive squad/stats sweep (used by the map).
A player's trophies, achievements and pinned showcase for a competition. Global (cross-competition) badges are folded in. Hidden badges appear only once earned.

404.description: Unknown user/competition, or a private profile the caller cannot see.

get.description: Another player's predictions - only for matches that have kicked off (pending picks stay private).

404.description: Unknown user, or a private profile the caller does not share a league with (admins and the user themself always pass).

get.summary: Call log for a chat scope
get.description: Recent voice calls (ongoing, ended, missed) of a DM thread or league/match room, oldest first, for the chat call lines. Caller must be a thread participant / league member.

get.summary: ICE servers for a voice call
get.description: STUN (always) and TURN (when coturn is configured) with an ephemeral credential. Used to set up the WebRTC peer connection for DM and league voice calls.
